title: Vendor in containers/(buildah,common, image)
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```
[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: Cockpit tests failed for commit d809c31b6d63b012574b167e95cffcde1be6fd5a. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

FYI, buildah tests will fail, see treadmill #13808:
```
[+1358s] not ok 269 bud pull never
         # (from function `die' in file tests/[helpers.bash, line 423](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/helpers.bash#L423),
         #  from function `run_buildah' in file tests/[helpers.bash, line 410](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/helpers.bash#L410),
         #  in test file tests/[bud.bats, line 4218](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/bud.bats#L4218))
         #   `run_buildah 125 build $WITH_POLICY_JSON -t ${target} --pull=false $BUDFILES/pull' failed
         # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d
         # # podman build --force-rm=false --layers=false --signature-policy /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/policy.json -t pull --pull-never /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/bud/pull
         # STEP 1/1: FROM busybox
         # Error: creating build container: busybox: image not known
         # [ rc=125 (expected) ]
         # # podman build --force-rm=false --layers=false --signature-policy /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/policy.json -t pull --pull=false /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/bud/pull
         # STEP 1/1: FROM busybox
         # Resolved "busybox" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
         # Trying to pull docker.io/library/busybox:latest...
         # Getting image source signatures
         # Copying blob sha256:9758c28807f21c13d05c704821fdd56c0b9574912f9b916c65e1df3e6b8bc572
         # Copying config sha256:f0b02e9d092d905d0d87a8455a1ae3e9bb47b4aa3dc125125ca5cd10d6441c9f
         # Writing manifest to image destination
         # COMMIT pull
         # --> f0b02e9d092d
         # Successfully tagged localhost/pull:latest
         # Successfully tagged docker.io/library/busybox:latest
         # f0b02e9d092d905d0d87a8455a1ae3e9bb47b4aa3dc125125ca5cd10d6441c9f
         # #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
         # #| FAIL: exit code is 0; expected 125
         # #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
         # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d
[+1360s] not ok 270 bud pull false no local image
         # (from function `die' in file tests/[helpers.bash, line 423](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/helpers.bash#L423),
         #  from function `run_buildah' in file tests/[helpers.bash, line 410](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/helpers.bash#L410),
         #  in test file tests/[bud.bats, line 4230](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/bud.bats#L4230))
         #   `run_buildah 125 build $WITH_POLICY_JSON -t ${target} --pull=false $BUDFILES/pull' failed
         # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d
         # # podman build --force-rm=false --layers=false --signature-policy /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/policy.json -t pull --pull=false /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/bud/pull
         # STEP 1/1: FROM busybox
         # Resolved "busybox" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
         # Trying to pull docker.io/library/busybox:latest...
         # Getting image source signatures
         # Copying blob sha256:9758c28807f21c13d05c704821fdd56c0b9574912f9b916c65e1df3e6b8bc572
         # Copying config sha256:f0b02e9d092d905d0d87a8455a1ae3e9bb47b4aa3dc125125ca5cd10d6441c9f
         # Writing manifest to image destination
         # COMMIT pull
         # --> f0b02e9d092d
         # Successfully tagged localhost/pull:latest
         # Successfully tagged docker.io/library/busybox:latest
         # f0b02e9d092d905d0d87a8455a1ae3e9bb47b4aa3dc125125ca5cd10d6441c9f
         # #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
         # #| FAIL: exit code is 0; expected 125
         # #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```

Also fails remote:
```
[+2132s] not ok 400 build test default ulimits
         # (from function `assert' in file tests/[helpers.bash, line 521](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/helpers.bash#L521),
         #  from function `expect_output' in file tests/[helpers.bash, line 548](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/helpers.bash#L548),
         #  in test file tests/[bud.bats, line 6669](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8e7313524563c527808dd1f134416a8fdac05430/test/system/bud.bats#L6669))
         #   `expect_output --substring "$podman_files"' failed
         # /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d
         # # [checking for: docker.io/library/alpine]
         # # [restoring from cache: /var/tmp/buildah-image-cache.3735 / docker.io/library/alpine]
         # Getting image source signatures
         # Copying blob sha256:9d16cba9fb961d1aafec9542f2bf7cb64acfc55245f9e4eb5abecd4cdc38d749
         # Copying config sha256:961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4
         # Writing manifest to image destination
         # # podman-remote build --force-rm=false --layers=false --no-cache --pull=false --signature-policy /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/policy.json -t foo/bar /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/bud/bud.limits
         # STEP 1/3: FROM alpine
         # STEP 2/3: RUN echo -n "Files="; awk '/open files/{print $4 "/" $5}' /proc/self/limits
         # Files=500/500
         # STEP 3/3: RUN echo -n "Processes="; awk '/processes/{print $3 "/" $4}' /proc/self/limits
         # Processes=4194304/4194304
         # COMMIT foo/bar
         # --> 7df1a799420e
         # Successfully tagged localhost/foo/bar:latest
         # 7df1a799420e43d74e11eb5d974960fbc600ea4a5cade065f59a8d0c7dbba65e
         # #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
         # #|     FAIL: podman-remote build --force-rm=false --layers=false --no-cache --pull=false --signature-policy /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/policy.json -t foo/bar /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test-buildah-v1.34.1-0.20240228191450-d80ec964ad1d/tests/bud/bud.limits
         # #| expected: =~ 'Error: unknown flag: --events-backend'
         # #|   actual:    'STEP 1/3: FROM alpine'
         # #|         >    'STEP 2/3: RUN echo -n "Files="; awk '/open files/{print $4 "/" $5}' /proc/self/limits'
         # #|         >    'Files=500/500'
         # #|         >    'STEP 3/3: RUN echo -n "Processes="; awk '/processes/{print $3 "/" $4}' /proc/self/limits'
         # #|         >    'Processes=4194304/4194304'
         # #|         >    'COMMIT foo/bar'
         # #|         >    '--> 7df1a799420e'
         # #|         >    'Successfully tagged localhost/foo/bar:latest'
         # #|         >    '7df1a799420e43d74e11eb5d974960fbc600ea4a5cade065f59a8d0c7dbba65e'
         # #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```
Thanks, I will look into this.

Red tests.
I'm surprised that common didn't get bumped too, but I could be off on that.  However, we'll need to get @ashley-cui changes to c/common vendored in later today/tomorrow before the RC gets cut.
